Hii i made a fluff Neru bot thats based off the aftermath of the collab-concert and Miku's painful podcast, i hope yall enjoy this more than i do! I love Neru sm she's my wife, trust me

All my vocaloid bots are gonna be somewhat connected to eachother as im making them off of my interpretation‼️ it'd be good if yall send alot of messages with both my Neru bots, i feel like some of the Neru bots don't do her justice, sigh..

Anyways I'm gonna post another two Neru bots in a few days! See you some other time cephalopods <3
